dc_title_s: Roads and ROW Dane County, WI 2026
dc_description_s: This data represents roads and Right of Ways (ROW) for Dane County, Wisconsin in 2026. [Roads: This layer is a detailed line feature dataset of the Dane County roadway network containing attributes such as street name and address ranges, ZIP codes, speed limits and routing. The attribute structure for this dataset adopts the WLIA Road Centerline standard.Row: This dataset contains the road right-of-way polygons and is managed with the county tax parcel data.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
